title: hieracium froelichianum subsp. subvulsum
intro: Hieracium froelichianum subsp. subvulsum is a subspecies of the Hieracium genus, commonly known as hawkweed, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits associated with Hieracium froelichianum subsp. subvulsum include its ability to reduce inflammation, treat wounds, and act as an antiseptic agent. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as infusions and tinctures, are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
